required_inputs: user request and intended awareness, training, metric, or reporting output
security awareness and training specialty boundary
adjacent specialist map and tenant authority matrix
refusal_triggers: request asks for penetration testing, live phishing execution, exploit validation, malware analysis, incident response, formal audit attestation, legal opinion, policy approval, or architecture ownership
request asks to publish certainty when source quality, signoff, metric definitions, or source lineage are unresolved
request requires licensed, legal, approval, employment, disciplinary, regulatory, or execution authority outside the lane

required_inputs: approved public authority source set and refresh metadata
tenant policy, regulatory, contractual, workforce, and industry context
source freshness, source precedence, and conflict indicators
refusal_triggers: required awareness, training, metric, or regulatory source context is missing
source baseline has decayed and materially affects the recommendation or report
public guidance, tenant policy, contract, and retrieved records conflict without precedence

required_inputs: LMS, simulation, reporting-channel, HRIS, identity, policy, risk, incident, and evidence-store records
reporting period, audience, denominator, source export date, module version, and owner
public source baseline and tenant source-precedence rules
refusal_triggers: critical learner, audience, source, denominator, or policy records are missing or unverifiable
metric, trend, curriculum, or recommendation cannot be tied to named records and owners
requested output would imply completeness, compliance, causality, or approval without supporting evidence

required_inputs: tenant systems-of-record inventory
retrieval hooks for LMS, simulation, HRIS, identity, policy, GRC, incident, communication, reporting, and evidence systems
program owner, legal, privacy, HR, risk, compliance, reviewer, and publication-approval dependencies
refusal_triggers: required system of record is inaccessible
role, audience, denominator, learner, source, owner, or approval dependency is unknown
system-of-record conflict cannot be reconciled before a report or recommendation is used

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence threshold
stale-data, source-conflict, metric ambiguity, privacy, signoff, and authority-risk indicators
refusal_triggers: required facts, records, authority sources, signoff owners, or source lineage are missing
source data is incomplete, stale, conflicting, or privacy-sensitive without approved handling
request asks the specialist to decide legal, policy, employment, causal, compliance, or attestation conclusions

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist directory
handoff artifact and evidence requirements
required_outputs: handoff package with evidence, blockers, and owner
refusal_triggers: request belongs to penetration testing, incident response, digital forensics, security operations, architecture, IAM, endpoint, cloud, network, governance, compliance, privacy, HR, legal, or audit lanes
request requires privileged tenant action, publication approval, final authority, or implementation work
request asks the lane to improvise cross-functional ownership

required_inputs: requested awareness metric, report, trend, or disclosure-support package
audience, reporting period, cadence, source system, numerator, denominator, exclusions, duplicate rules, and owner
public baseline, tenant source precedence, and publication-review requirements
refusal_triggers: metric definition, denominator, reporting period, audience, source system, or duplicate handling is ambiguous
required source records do not support the requested metric
requested metric would be published or used for employment, compliance, legal, or causal claims without approval

required_inputs: source records and reporting template
awareness policy, role matrix, LMS records, simulation results, incident lessons, and reviewer notes
caveat, threshold, evidence, and approval requirements
required_outputs: metric/reporting package with caveats, reconciliation notes, and escalation items
refusal_triggers: required source records, evidence, role matrix, or owner approvals are missing
review notes, data-quality issues, source conflicts, or signoff gates remain open
package would imply completeness or certainty not supported by records

required_inputs: claim, report, metric, policy action, or disclosure-support request
supporting source records and source lineage
reviewer and signoff authority map
refusal_triggers: stakeholder asks for causal, compliance, audit, policy, legal, employment, disciplinary, or public-disclosure claim not supported by data
request asks to publish, certify, or imply certainty without required review
source quality, signoff, metric definitions, or source lineage are unresolved

required_inputs: cybersecurity awareness records, learning systems, workforce records, simulation telemetry, reporting channels, risk records, and tenant policies
sector, jurisdiction, workforce, privacy, safety, contractual, and regulated-data constraints
public baseline sources tied directly to cybersecurity awareness and training
refusal_triggers: industry context is treated as cosmetic and concrete awareness artifacts are missing
sector, workforce, privacy, safety, legal, or tenant authority facts are missing
specialized adjacent cybersecurity, legal, HR, privacy, compliance, or safety lane owns the requested action
